# Varun Choraria

> AI B2B marketing consultant and operator. Essays on go-to-market strategy, management, careers, AI, product marketing, and building useful things.

## About

Varun Choraria is an AI B2B marketing consultant for mid-sized SaaS companies, with about a decade of experience across positioning, messaging, product marketing, and go-to-market strategy. He most recently led marketing at GTM Buddy. He is also building Grow & Close, a senior-led, AI-native GTM execution studio.

## Writing

- [/blog/](/blog/): every essay, newest first, grouped by year
- [/tags/](/tags/): essays grouped by topic
- [/feed/](/feed/): RSS subscription instructions

## Work

- [/work/](/work/): professional background and current work
- [/about/](/about/): biography, experience, and current focus

## Consulting

- [/consulting/](/consulting/): consulting fit, working model, and ways to work with Varun
- [/ai-b2b-marketing-consultant/](/ai-b2b-marketing-consultant/): AI-first B2B marketing systems, workflows, and implementation
- [/b2b-saas-product-marketing-consultant/](/b2b-saas-product-marketing-consultant/): positioning, messaging, launches, and sales enablement for B2B SaaS

## Side Projects

- [/side-quests/](/side-quests/): public projects, tools, and experiments

## Beyond Work

- [/fun/](/fun/): book, speaking, and podcast work
  - **Book:** *Miracle-preneuring: Why anyone can and should be an entrepreneur* (2016) — self-published, covered by Forbes, Entrepreneur, and 50+ outlets. Available on Amazon and Apple Books.
  - **Speaking:** talks on product marketing and B2B GTM at Wynter, Product Marketing Alliance, AIC Prestige / AIM / Niti Aayog / Microsoft For Startups, and others.
  - **Podcast:** co-hosted *The Edge Podcast for CHROs* (2021, two seasons) — future of work, guests from GoJek, Infosys, Oracle, Razorpay, Doist, and others.
